cc_row_acceleration_subtitle: Choose the pointer motion prediction profile.
cc_row_accounts_subtitle: Google, Nextcloud, Microsoft, and other calendar, file, and mail providers.
cc_row_accent_subtitle: Quick selection of the main interface accent color.
cc_row_apply_appearance_subtitle: Apply all pending Appearance changes to the current session.

cc_row_admin_roles_subtitle: Grant or revoke sudo rights for local accounts.
cc_row_animations_subtitle: Fade-ins, transitions, and light movement during navigation.
cc_row_audio_input_subtitle: Active microphone for recordings and calls.
cc_row_audio_mixer_subtitle: Separate volume levels for every running application.
cc_row_audio_output_subtitle: Default speakers or headphones for the whole session.

cc_row_autostart_subtitle: List of applications started when you log in.

cc_row_color_mode_subtitle: Manual or automatic light/dark switching based on a schedule.

cc_row_cursor_theme_subtitle: Cursor theme for the whole session.
cc_row_devices_subtitle: Pair headphones, keyboards, mice, and controllers.
cc_row_disk_usage_subtitle: Check space usage and the largest directories.
cc_row_display_arrangement_subtitle: Drag displays, set the primary monitor, and align workspace geometry.

cc_row_orientation_subtitle: Set the screen orientation to landscape or portrait.

cc_row_export_profile_subtitle: Save a copy of current settings to hyalo-profile-export.json.
cc_row_focus_follows_subtitle: Focus follows the pointer without clicking.
cc_row_font_size_subtitle: Scales interface readability without changing DPI.

cc_row_gamepad_subtitle: Test inputs, vibration, and basic gamepad mapping.

cc_row_hinting_subtitle: Antialiasing and hinting for improved text rendering.

cc_row_install_keyboard_subtitle: Install dictionaries, fonts, and language support for the current layout.
cc_row_known_networks_subtitle: Browse saved profiles, security, and connection priorities.
cc_row_language_subtitle: Language for HyaloOS and system applications. Takes effect after restarting Settings.
cc_row_lid_action_subtitle: Action for laptops and hybrid devices.
cc_row_location_subtitle: Access to geolocation services and time zones.
cc_row_mail_subtitle: Handles mailto links and system messages.

cc_row_natural_scroll_subtitle: Reverses scroll direction, like on touch surfaces.

cc_row_notifications_timeout_subtitle: How long messages remain visible on screen.

cc_row_password_resume_subtitle: Require authentication after the session wakes up.

cc_row_pointer_speed_subtitle: Pointer sensitivity for mouse and touchpad.
cc_row_power_profile_subtitle: Balance temperature, noise, and battery life.

cc_row_refresh_subtitle: Available modes depend on the active display.
cc_row_region_subtitle: Date, currency, measurement, and number formatting.
cc_row_repeat_delay_subtitle: How quickly a key starts repeating when held.

cc_row_screen_blank_subtitle: After how much inactivity the screen should lock.

cc_row_slideshow_subtitle: Uses the local wallpaper library and changes the wallpaper every day.
cc_row_snapping_subtitle: Snap windows to screen edges and halves.
cc_row_sync_subtitle: Check sync scope for calendar, contacts, and files.
cc_row_system_info_subtitle: Kernel, CPU, GPU, memory, and desktop version.
cc_row_tablet_subtitle: Map tablet work area to a display and pen buttons.
cc_row_theme_subtitle: Chooses one of the built-in HyaloOS visual standards. Pastel is the default base style for the environment.
cc_row_touchpad_gestures_subtitle: Switch workspaces and overview windows from the touchpad.
cc_row_transparency_subtitle: Transparency level for cards and the main desktop shell surfaces.
cc_row_user_accounts_subtitle: Add users, reset passwords, and change profile images.
cc_row_video_subtitle: Default application for files and video streams.
cc_row_vpn_profiles_subtitle: OpenVPN, WireGuard, and other tunneled connections for the entire session.
cc_row_vrr_subtitle: Use adaptive sync on supported monitors.
cc_row_wallpaper_subtitle: Choose the current wallpaper from local and system image libraries.

cc_row_wallpaper_output_subtitle: Select a specific wallpaper for this connected display.
cc_row_wallpaper_preview_subtitle: Live preview of the wallpaper currently selected in this section.
cc_row_window_theme_subtitle: Decoration theme aligned with HyaloWM and the HyaloOS style.
cc_row_workspace_animations_subtitle: Smooth transitions between workspaces and overview states.
cc_row_workspace_assignments_subtitle: Choose which applications should start on a specific workspace.
cc_row_workspace_count_subtitle: How many persistent workspaces the session should have.

cc_session_caption: The first backend layer is already active: config saving, styling, and panel settings are ready for further expansion.
cc_status_export_failed: Could not export the settings profile.
cc_status_exported: Profile exported to the user configuration directory.
cc_status_display_tool_missing: Display configuration tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_display_layout_applied: Applied monitor layout to active outputs.
cc_status_display_apply_pending: Display changes are pending. Click Apply to enforce them.
cc_status_network_tool_missing: Network configuration tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_audio_tool_missing: Audio mixer tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_firewall_tool_missing: Firewall management tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_firewall_cli_only: Firewall rules require a CLI workflow for now.
cc_status_bluetooth_tool_missing: No Bluetooth management tool is installed.
cc_status_tool_missing: Required tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_gpu_driver_launch_failed: Could not launch the GPU driver manager.
cc_status_gpu_driver_started: GPU driver manager started in terminal.
cc_status_gpu_driver_tool_missing: GPU driver manager tool is not installed in this session.
cc_status_gpu_scan_tool_missing: No supported package manager available to scan GPU drivers.
cc_status_gpu_install_started: Started installing the selected GPU driver in terminal.
cc_status_gpu_install_running: A GPU driver installation is already running.
cc_gpu_scan_hint: Click Scan to load available GPU drivers.
cc_gpu_scan_no_results: No GPU driver candidates were found.
cc_gpu_installed_none: No installed GPU driver packages were detected.
cc_status_language_restart: Language saved. Restart Settings to reload translations.
cc_status_save_failed: Could not save the user configuration.
cc_status_saved: Saved the change to the HyaloOS configuration.
cc_status_apply_pending: Appearance changes are pending. Click Apply to update the session.
cc_status_nothing_to_apply: No pending appearance changes to apply.
cc_status_wallpaper_imported: Imported the wallpaper to the user library.
clock_panel_placeholder: Clock and calendar will be expanded later in a dedicated app.
clock_panel_subtitle: Time and your day at a glance.
launcher_power_dialog_logout_body: Choose whether to log out or suspend the computer.
launcher_power_dialog_shutdown_body: Choose whether to restart or power off the computer.
launcher_subtitle: Quick access to apps and system settings.
quick_panel_subtitle: Network, audio, and quick session actions.
workspace_remove_confirm: Click again to remove occupied workspace
workspace_overview_subtitle: Overview of desktops and running applications.
uc_missing_aur: No AUR helper found (supported: paru, yay).
uc_system_backend_missing: No system backend available for updates.
uc_notify_busy: An update is already running. Please wait.
uc_auth_subtitle: To enter Update Center, provide your administrator password. The password is validated locally via sudo and is never persisted.
uc_auth_subtitle_refresh: The sudo session expired. To continue the update, enter your administrator password.
uc_auth_sudo_refresh_canceled: Update canceled - sudo session was not refreshed.
cc_status_keyboard_layout_restart_sessio: Keyboard layout saved. Sign out and sign in again to apply to the whole Wayland session.
cc_status_keyboard_package_done: Keyboard layouts installed. Restart Settings to refresh the list.
ss_missing_grim: Missing grim. Install grim to take screenshots.
ss_missing_slurp: Missing slurp. Install slurp to capture selected area.
cc_card_desktop_menu_subtitle: Items shown when right-clicking on the desktop.
